segments.speaker: 题目4/5
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. I'm so excited about our road trip this weekend. I'm all packed and got the food and snacks for the trip. I thought David was supposed to prepare snacks. No, it was me. David signed up to bring water for everyone I see. Are you all packed? Yes. I just want to get my car checked before we leave. I'm taking it to the mechanic tomorrow morning. Good idea. By the way, I just checked, and there might be light showers in the afternoon, but overall good weather on our route.
